subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Praise be to God that thou hast attained unto that which most of mankind are veiled from and debarred. All are [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی الحمد لله فائز شدی بانچه اکثر خلق از او محجوب و ممنوعند کل از برای
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
